description: Code block with lines revealing one by one, a highlighted key line, and a callout value below

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the code panel, e.g. 'MALICIOUS PAYLOAD' or 'BACKDOOR CODE'
fields.KEY_PATH: File path shown in the tab bar, e.g. '/etc/cron.d/updater' or 'config.php'
fields.CODE_LINE_1: Line of code or config, e.g. 'import subprocess'
fields.KEY_VALUE: Annotation shown below the highlight, e.g. '← decoded payload executes remote shell'
